insights: The market has shown a clear upward trajectory over the last 10 days, with the current 7-day average (1012) significantly outpacing the 30-day average (991), signaling sustained momentum.
FAANG+ companies are showing increased volatility but a higher baseline, suggesting they are beginning to open more entry-level pipelines as they finalize budget cycles.
The consistent growth in the total job count indicates a recovery phase, likely driven by renewed hiring confidence in high-growth tech sectors rather than broad-based expansion.
